## Meeting Purpose

[To pivot office hours into a training session on data-driven account growth.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Training Program:** Kyle is launching a program to shift from reactive content creation to proactive, data-driven growth analysis. The kickoff is Tuesday, with a follow-up Friday for team-led account walkthroughs.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [**Airbyte Content Pivot:** Airbyte's low engagement (14–19%) with AI engineers requires a pivot to technical, specific content. The strategy is to source real-world examples from their SEs and Gong transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**CheckTar Launch Mixed:** The CheckTar launch had mixed results. X posts performed well but are suspect due to bots, while the LinkedIn post is underperforming typical posts (421 likes vs. 500+).](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)

## Topics

### New Training Program: Data-Driven Growth

  - [**Problem:** The team defaults to creating new content, a reactive approach with diminishing returns.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new training program to build a proactive, data-driven growth analysis muscle.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [**Framework:** Analyze the content lifecycle to diagnose issues at each stage:](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [Indexing → Impressions → Engagement → Conversion](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Kickoff Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Tuesday:** Kyle will lead a deep dive using early-stage and mature account examples.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Friday:** Team members will lead live walkthroughs of their own accounts for discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### Airbyte: Pivoting Content for AI Engineers

  - [**Problem:** Low engagement (14–19%) on developer-centric content clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** The content is too high-level and lacks the specific, technical examples developers need.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Source real-world examples to provide authentic, actionable content.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [**Internal:** Brainstorm with Mario (SE) and analyze Gong call transcripts.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
      - [**External:** Find respected voices on platforms like YouTube and TikTok.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [**Visuals:** Experiment with Kirkland for a custom pipeline to generate repeatable, high-quality architecture diagrams, as NanoBanana Pro is too time-consuming.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### CheckTar Launch Performance

  - [**X (Twitter):** High engagement, but suspected bot activity makes the data unreliable.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [**LinkedIn:** Underperforming typical posts (421 likes vs. 500+).](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
      - [**Context:** The launch coincided with major model releases (Opus, ChatGPT), creating significant market noise.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

### General Updates

  - [**Reporting:** January reports were well-received. Erik uses Gamma to convert Notion docs to decks, and Kyle noted Claude can now create PowerPoints.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Talal's Workload:** Brex audit (high-priority), Navan, SentinelOne monthly reporting, and reviewing "abnormal forecast" tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kyle:** Schedule the new training program for Tuesday and Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [Schedule a brainstorming session with Airbyte's SE, Mario.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
      - [Request Gong call transcripts from Airbyte.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [Explore a custom diagram pipeline with Kirkland.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [**Talal:** Review "abnormal forecast" tickets for SentinelOne.](https://fathom.video/share/3uGHmXXq_SvLKZZGzjpaky8qdbc-KEYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
